faqs.question: What pests are most common in Kew Gardens Hills homes?
faqs.answer: Kew Gardens Hills residents most frequently deal with German cockroaches, mice, ants, and occasional spiders. The area's older housing stock and proximity to green spaces can attract rodents, while apartment buildings often experience roach issues. Our general pest control service addresses all these common pests with targeted treatments.
